description: Frozen evidence of effective Node/sql.js schema and compatibility semantics; contains no database row values.

inputs.hashScope: effective tables, columns, constraints and indexes
AppDatabase migrate through migrateScanFilesTable compatibility method block

ordering.columns: effective SQLite ordinal (CREATE order, then ensureColumn order)

tables.name: ai_configs
history: project/thinking fields may be ensureColumn additions; project rows are globalized and exact duplicate identities are collapsed
backfillPrerequisites: remap conversations to the smallest equivalent config id before duplicate deletion
invariants: effective configs are global after migration

tables.name: attachments
history: project_id is an ensureColumn addition for legacy polymorphic owner rows
backfillPrerequisites: assign NULL project_id only after the default project exists
invariants: stored_path is audited independently from row ownership
relations: owner_type/owner_id -> requirements or feedback is audit/application constrained

tables.name: chat_messages
history: project_id and conversation_id are compatibility additions
backfillPrerequisites: repair conversation ownership and create/reuse a per-project default conversation for unscoped messages
invariants: message and conversation project ids agree

tables.name: claude_cli_configs
history: nullable project_id retains global/legacy scope compatibility
backfillPrerequisites: audit default uniqueness and historical project scope before strengthening constraints
invariants: default uniqueness is application enforced in Node
relations: project_id is nullable legacy/global scope metadata

tables.name: conversations
history: project_id, ai_config_id, pinned_at and codex_session_id are compatibility additions
backfillPrerequisites: default project exists and AI duplicate ids are remapped

tables.name: events
history: project_id is added and legacy NULL values are assigned to the default project
invariants: message/meta must not leak secrets into infrastructure output

tables.name: executors
history: fresh CREATE requires project/label/command/timestamps while legacy ensureColumn supplies 1 or empty compatibility defaults
backfillPrerequisites: default project 1, JSON dependencies and required empty values are audited
invariants: dependency labels are JSON application keys

tables.name: feedback
history: project/link/config/session/failure fields are additions; linked_plan_id predates normalized links
backfillPrerequisites: project assignment precedes same-project linked plan backfill

tables.name: intake_plan_links
history: table is created after initial DDL; valid same-project legacy links become phase 1 links
backfillPrerequisites: project/intake/plan exist and uniqueness conflicts are reported
invariants: phase index and plan tuple uniqueness are per project/type/intake

tables.name: loop_state
history: retained singleton compatibility table with id fixed to 1
backfillPrerequisites: may seed only the first project and missing default project state
invariants: cannot represent or overwrite authoritative multi-project state
relations: legacy seed only; no durable project foreign key

tables.name: plan_tasks
backfillPrerequisites: orphan plans and duplicate plan/task keys fail audit
invariants: task_key is unique within a plan
status and sort_order drive deterministic aggregation

tables.name: plans
history: project/sort/backend/session fields are additions; config ids are ensureColumn-only; invalid sort orders are allocated
backfillPrerequisites: project assignment precedes per-project created_at/id ordering
relations: tasks and legacy/normalized intake links reference plans

tables.name: project_states
history: backend config ids, prompt and env_vars are additions; default state is seeded from loop_state
backfillPrerequisites: default project exists; INSERT OR IGNORE preserves existing state
invariants: env_vars and Claude tokens are secret material

tables.name: projects
history: empty legacy databases receive one project derived from loop_state
backfillPrerequisites: loop_state is readable when projects is empty

tables.name: requirements
history: project/link/config/acceptance/failure fields are additions; linked_plan_id predates normalized links
backfillPrerequisites: project assignment precedes valid same-project link backfill

tables.name: scan_files
history: legacy key omitted project_id; rename/create/copy/drop adds project ownership using the selected fallback id
backfillPrerequisites: default project exists and legacy table is completely readable

tables.name: scripts
history: source_type and schedule_cron are compatibility additions
backfillPrerequisites: project and path ownership pass audit

tables.name: settings
history: defaults are inserted by key without overwriting existing values
backfillPrerequisites: settings exists before legacy chat config migration
invariants: credential and local-path keys have sensitive policy

defaultData.behavior: INSERT OR IGNORE idle singleton with SQLite current time
seed only when missing from loop_state without emitting values
INSERT OR IGNORE; generated MCP token migrates to secret_refs without inventorying its value
create one global config only when none exists, sourcing legacy chat settings
create/reuse per project only for unscoped legacy messages

compatibilityMigrations.behavior: append every missing compatibility column in source order without rewriting existing definitions
compatibilityMigrations.dataEffect: ALTER defaults apply to existing legacy rows where declared
compatibilityMigrations.failureRisk: fresh and upgraded physical defaults can differ

markers: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS intake_plan_links
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_intake_plan_links_intake_phase
compatibilityMigrations.behavior: create normalized polymorphic link table and three indexes
compatibilityMigrations.failureRisk: no foreign key prevents historical orphans

preconditions: projects is empty and loop_state is readable
compatibilityMigrations.behavior: create the first project from legacy singleton state
compatibilityMigrations.dataEffect: adds exactly one project only when none exists

compatibilityMigrations.behavior: insert frozen keys without overwriting values
compatibilityMigrations.dataEffect: may generate an MCP token and default chat/update/terminal values
compatibilityMigrations.failureRisk: raw setting values never enter reports

markers: ALTER TABLE scan_files RENAME TO scan_files_legacy
preconditions: default project exists and final composite key is absent
compatibilityMigrations.behavior: rename, recreate, coalesce/copy and drop legacy scan table
compatibilityMigrations.dataEffect: adds project ownership and may replace duplicate final keys

markers: UPDATE ${table} SET project_id = ? WHERE project_id IS NULL
preconditions: default project and final scan table exist
compatibilityMigrations.behavior: assign NULL project ownership across the frozen table set
compatibilityMigrations.failureRisk: non-NULL orphan/cross-project ids remain for audit

preconditions: project assignment and normalized schema completed
compatibilityMigrations.behavior: add phase 1 only for positive existing same-project plans

markers: ORDER BY COALESCE(project_id, 0) ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC
UPDATE plans SET sort_order = ? WHERE id = ?
compatibilityMigrations.behavior: preserve positive order and allocate increasing values per project
seed a missing state from singleton values

markers: DELETE FROM ai_configs WHERE id IN
preconditions: AI compatibility columns and conversations exist
compatibilityMigrations.behavior: globalize, retain minimum identical id, remap then delete duplicates
compatibilityMigrations.dataEffect: project ids are nulled and exact duplicates deleted

markers: SELECT id FROM ai_configs WHERE project_id IS NULL LIMIT 1
preconditions: global dedupe completed and settings readable
compatibilityMigrations.behavior: create one global default only when none exists
compatibilityMigrations.dataEffect: legacy credential is read; schema v1 routes raw secret to secret_refs

markers: SELECT id FROM conversations WHERE project_id = ? AND title = ?
preconditions: default project exists and config remap completed
compatibilityMigrations.behavior: align ownership and attach unscoped messages to default conversations
compatibilityMigrations.dataEffect: may create one default conversation per project
compatibilityMigrations.failureRisk: missing conversation ids remain blocking orphans

foreignKeyDecisions.precondition: NULL assignment and orphan audit pass

foreignKeyDecisions.rationale: file deletion is external to SQLite
polymorphic owner has no single lossless foreign key
task is owned by one plan

foreignKeyDecisions.precondition: unscoped migration and orphan audit pass
remap completes and missing ids fail audit

foreignKeyDecisions.rationale: polymorphic intake has no single lossless foreign key
invalid denormalized history is preserved while normalized links become canonical
foreignKeyDecisions.precondition: invalid/cross-project values are reported, never cleared

foreignKeyDecisions.rationale: legacy seed is not authoritative project state
foreignKeyDecisions.precondition: schema v1 services ignore it as multi-project state

sensitiveData.migrationPolicy: move raw values to secret_refs; business rows retain only redacted reference/presence
retain scoped compatibility identifiers; never use as authorization
preserve unknown compatibility content; isolate structurally identifiable secrets without parse-and-drop
sensitiveData.eventPolicy: never emit environment or command bodies
sensitiveData.fixturePolicy: synthetic inert commands and fake variables

sensitiveData.migrationPolicy: preserve values but require read-only path audit; evidence stores field names/placeholders only
sensitiveData.apiPolicy: authorized project/local session after allowed-root checks
sensitiveData.fixturePolicy: reserved fake or generator-owned temporary roots only

sensitiveData.migrationPolicy: preserve rows without copying content into reports/fixtures
sensitiveData.logPolicy: do not duplicate; redact credential fragments

sensitiveData.migrationPolicy: preserve validated endpoints separately from credentials
sensitiveData.eventPolicy: never emit auth headers or token-bearing URLs

risks.statement: Node best-effort compatibility statements have no schema_migrations/user_version.
No current SQLite foreign keys; unexplained orphan/cross-project data is rejected, never repaired silently.
Attachment owner and intake id remain audit/application constrained.
Rename/create/copy/drop can leave an ambiguous legacy table.
Global dedupe requires identity/reference proof before deletion.
Fresh and upgraded executor/scan physical defaults differ.
Paths refer outside SQLite; audit is read-only and never repairs/deletes files.
Credentials/env/commands/logs/content never enter reports, APIs, events or copied fixtures.
Legacy singleton is not authoritative multi-project state.
